file_insights.purpose: Centralized public API for the Menu module with organized exports grouped by category (Module Definition, Services, Repositories, Controllers, Routes, Events, Types, Schemas)
Defines all domain events for Menu module with typed payloads and emitter functions
event_categories: Menu Events (Created, Updated, Deleted, Restored, Published, Unpublished, Settings Updated)
Product Events (Created, Updated, Deleted, Availability Changed, Reordered)
file_insights.event_structure: Each event has typed payload interface extending BaseEventPayload with organizationId and timestamp

file_insights.purpose: Defines MenuModule class with lifecycle hooks, dependency injection, and module registration
file_insights.class_structure: MenuModule extends BaseModule with hooks for onInit, onRegister, onBootstrap
key_features: Module metadata with name, version, description
Export of MenuModuleContext and MenuModuleHooks types

file_insights.purpose: Defines all routes for Menu module with path builders, endpoint metadata, and route grouping
route_categories: Menu routes (list, create, get, update, delete, publish, unpublish, duplicate)
file_insights.endpoint_metadata: MenuEndpointMetadata with HTTP method, path, description, authentication requirements

patterns_discovered.description: Central index.ts file groups exports by functional area (Services, Repositories, Controllers, Routes, Events, Types, Schemas) with section comments for clarity
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces import paths and provides single source of truth for module's public API

patterns_discovered.description: Event payloads extend BaseEventPayload interface providing common fields (organizationId, timestamp, triggeredBy) with specific payload types per event
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe event handling with consistent structure across all domain events

patterns_discovered.description: MenuModule implements BaseModule with hooks for different lifecycle stages (onInit, onRegister, onBootstrap)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows modules to execute code at specific initialization stages

patterns_discovered.description: Routes organized in three levels: menu routes, category routes (nested under menus), product routes (nested under categories) with path builder functions
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reflects domain hierarchy and provides type-safe route building

patterns_discovered.description: Centralized metadata for all endpoints including HTTP method, path, description, and authentication requirements
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables dynamic documentation generation and route validation

patterns_discovered.description: Named emitter functions (e.g., emitMenuCreated) that provide type-safe wrappers around generic event emission
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents typos in event names and ensures consistent event payload structure

patterns_discovered.description: All request, response, and entity types exported from index.ts grouped by category
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consumer code has complete type information without navigating multiple files

patterns_discovered.description: Zod schemas exported alongside their TypeScript input types for runtime validation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides both compile-time and runtime type safety

gotchas_discovered.description: Fields like createdBy, updatedBy, deletedBy are marked optional with ? but userId context may be required in many operations
gotchas_discovered.risk: Code may fail at runtime if these fields are not populated when expected by consumers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document required fields in event handlers and validate at emission time

gotchas_discovered.description: index.ts contains 326 lines with 150+ exports which could impact bundle size if tree-shaking is not properly configured
gotchas_discovered.risk: Unused exports may bloat bundles despite modular structure
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify tree-shaking in build configuration and consider named exports over re-exports

gotchas_discovered.description: Product routes are nested under categories which are nested under menus, creating complex route path hierarchies
gotchas_discovered.risk: Path construction errors if builder functions are not used correctly
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Enforce use of buildProductApiPath() and similar helpers rather than manual path construction

gotchas_discovered.description: MenuModule depends on EventService, DatabaseService, and CacheService but these are likely injected at runtime without explicit type documentation
gotchas_discovered.risk: Runtime errors if services are not registered before module initialization
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document module dependencies clearly and enforce dependency order in application bootstrap

gotchas_discovered.description: timestamp field in BaseEventPayload is string type without specification of format (ISO8601, Unix timestamp, etc)
gotchas_discovered.risk: Inconsistent timestamp handling across event consumers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Standardize on ISO8601 format and document in event emitter functions

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created foundational Menu module infrastructure with routes, events, and module definition
key_achievements: Created comprehensive barrel export file (index.ts) organizing 150+ exports into logical sections
Defined complete event system with 6+ event categories and 8+ typed emitter functions
Implemented MenuModule with dependency injection and lifecycle hooks
Established hierarchical route structure reflecting domain hierarchy (Menu > Category > Product)
Created endpoint metadata registry for documentation and validation
Provided full type safety throughout module with 30+ exported types
Documented all exports with comprehensive JSDoc comments and examples

recommendations.recommendation: Add strict null checks and required field validation in event emitter functions to ensure userId fields are populated
recommendations.rationale: Prevents runtime errors from missing user context in audit trails

recommendations.recommendation: Create API documentation generator from MenuEndpointMetadata to maintain synchronized docs
recommendations.rationale: Prevents documentation drift as endpoints are added or modified

recommendations.recommendation: Add comprehensive test suite for event emission ensuring all payload fields are correctly populated
Audit webpack/build configuration to verify tree-shaking is enabled for menu module exports
recommendations.rationale: Prevents unused exports from inflating bundle size

recommendations.recommendation: Create route path constants instead of string literals to prevent path construction errors
recommendations.rationale: Centralizes route paths and enables refactoring without breaking route references

recommendations.recommendation: Standardize timestamp format to ISO8601 and document timestamp generation in event emitter functions
recommendations.rationale: Ensures consistent timestamp handling across all event consumers

recommendations.recommendation: Create module initialization documentation showing dependency requirements and setup order
recommendations.rationale: Helps developers correctly bootstrap menu module with required services

recommendations.recommendation: Consider splitting menu.routes.ts if it exceeds 500 lines, separating menu/category/product routes into separate files
recommendations.rationale: Improves maintainability as route definitions grow
